rule: Every APF output must declare the physical scheme before audit.
All external ledgers named before evaluator use.
Evaluator must fail closed if coefficients/scheme/covariance are missing.
No sector is assigned P_physical_final in v65.
QED/QCD/electroweak transport cannot be selected to reduce APF residuals.
Future work is implementation of external evaluators, not APF trace-source derivation.
